title: 8 Currency Notices on FX Notes
body_text:
8	Currency Notices on FX Notes
8.1	Viewing Notices on FX Notes
The Important Information section on the FX Notes home page provides updates on available currencies and other important information. ItГўВҖВҷs recommended that you check for notices when using the application. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Example of a Currency Notice
8.2	Posting Notices on FX Notes
FX Notes Managers can post notices that appear on the dashboard of FX Notes.
To add a notice:
Log in to FX Notes as described in Section 6.2, Logging in to FX Notes.
Select
Administration,
then select
Important Posts
on the left-hand menu. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Select ГўВҖВңAdministrationГўВҖВқ and ГўВҖВңImportant PostsГўВҖВқ
Select
Add Institution Post
on the right side. See Figure 3.
Figure 3: Select ГўВҖВңAdd Institution PostГўВҖВқ
Select the institution the notice applies to (if applicable) and provide the noticeГўВҖВҷs content. Then, select
Save
. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Select ГўВҖВңSaveГўВҖВқ
The notice is displayed on the Dashboard. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: New Notice
END
